title: Add Betterleaks secret scanning
description: Add Betterleaks secret scanning to the repo so pull requests and pushes are checked for hardcoded credentials. Prefer repo-level CI enforcement with optional local scans for developers.
acceptance_criteria: Secret scan workflow exists. Agent docs describe local and CI usage. Findings are treated as blockers until reviewed.

title: Failed connection attempts are persisted
description: When a user saves invalid database connection details, PrismSQL shows a connection failure but still persists the connection in the sidebar. Root cause: ConnectionModal saved the config before attempting connect. Expected behavior: connect first, save only on success.
acceptance_criteria: Failed connection attempts do not call saveConnection. Successful connection attempts save after connect succeeds. npm test and npm run build pass.
notes: Fixed locally on branch fix/failed-connection-persistence with tests/connection-modal.test.ts.
